text:
進撃st-hrn-eg20130629巨人 is the 10th track on the "Attack on Titan" Original Soundtrack II. It is also the 15th track on disc 1 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 2 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

st – String Instruments
hrn – Horns
gt – Guitar

Musical motifs

The track incorporates 2 motifs: 立body機motion (0:52-1:58) and DOA (3:02-3:38). 

All occurrences

Episode 16 - The Scout Regiment sets out on the 57th Exterior Scouting Mission
Episode 17 - Reiner attacks and manages to escape from the Female Titan (2nd part)
Episode 42 - The Scout Regiment defeats the Royal Government
Episode 48 - The reforms of the new regime
Episode 49 - The mission to retake Wall Maria begins
